title: centella hermanniifolia var. litoralis
intro: Centella hermanniifolia var. litoralis, also known as centella, is a plant species that belongs to the family Apiaceae and is native to tropical and subtropical regions. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory activities. The health benefits of centella include improved cognitive function, enhanced wound healing, and protection against neurodegenerative diseases, as well as its potential to improve cardiovascular health and reduce stress levels. Centella can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, extracts, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and enjoy its health benefits.
